S.FORM: I 1945 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 13 a romi'ad masofoc ci D√©si Bouterse , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Suriname anini i ci D√©si Bouterse, patirengan a romi'ad i 2010 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 12 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i …¨~…ģ*si b~b~vo~uo~u~ut…ôrs…ô , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u so~u~urinam…ô anini i ¶i …¨~…ģ*si b~b~vo~uo~u~ut…ôrs…ô, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1945 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 13 a romi'ad masofoc ci D√©si Bouterse , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Suriname anini i ci D√©si Bouterse, patirengan a romi'ad i 2010 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 12 a romi'ad.
